novel.create.title: Create New Novel
novel.title: Novel Title
phase1.title: Two-Phase Novel Generation
phase1.subtitle: Generate complete world-building, character design and story outline
phase1.form.title: Creative Input & Configuration
phase1.guide.title: Instructions
phase1.guide.goal.title: 🎯 Phase 1 Goal
phase1.guide.goal.desc: Generate complete world-building, character design and detailed story outline to provide a high-quality foundation for subsequent chapter generation.
phase1.guide.content.title: ⚙️ Generated Content
phase1.guide.content.desc:
• World-building and background story
• Main character design and personality traits
• Story development stage planning
• Detailed chapter outlines
• Emotional threads and foreshadowing
phase1.guide.bestPractice.title: 💡 Best Practices
phase1.guide.bestPractice.desc:
• Describe core settings in detail (300+ words recommended)
• Clarify main selling points and features
• Plan chapter count reasonably (20-100 chapters recommended)
• Generate settings first, review before continuing
phase1.guide.nextSteps.title: 🔄 Next Steps
phase1.guide.nextSteps.desc:
After Phase 1 completes, you can:
• Continue to Phase 2 chapter generation
• Save project and continue later
• View and edit generated settings
• Adjust parameters and regenerate

phase2.subtitle: Batch generate high-quality novel chapters based on Phase 1 design settings
